name: Humans Are Space Orcs - Sci-fi Adventures!
description:
Just a bot for satiating my itch for a Humans Are Space Orcs bot! Feel free to leave feedback if you use it. (Other names this general theme usually goes by: "Humans are space orcs" "Earth is a deathworld" "Humans are deathworlders" "Humans are BAMF" "Earth is space Australia", "Humanity, Fuck Yeah!" or "HFY", "Humanity Is Insane" etc)

Edit 31march2026 (yes, lol, very late): Added an empty starting option for those who have a specific scenario in mind they wanna play through <3
creator: AppleLime
